app.title: Sankalp
app.tagline: Your democracy, decoded. In your language.
chat.placeholder: Ask about voter registration, your booth, or your constituency…
chat.empty: Hi — I can help you register to vote, check the rolls, find your booth, or read your constituency's story. What can I help with?
voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Please type.
voice.error: Voice input failed. Please type instead.
camera.label: Take a photo of your EPIC card
camera.failed: I couldn't read the card. Try again with better lighting, or type the EPIC manually.
cards.demo_data_tooltip: Sankalp ships with a representative mock dataset of ~100 constituencies and ~5,000 voters. We don't access the live electoral roll. Tap to learn more.
cards.voter.title: Voter record
cards.booth.title: Polling booth
cards.pdf.title: Form ready
cards.pdf.next_step: Next: upload this PDF on voters.eci.gov.in along with your address proof.
cards.pdf.qr_label: Scan to open the ECI portal
cards.story.title: Why your vote matters
error.network: I couldn't reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.session_lost: Your session has expired. Starting fresh.
about.title: About Sankalp
about.body: Sankalp helps Indian voters register, verify, find their polling booth, and understand why their vote matters — in their own language. We don't replace the official process; we make it walkable. Forms are pre-filled approximations the user submits themselves at voters.eci.gov.in. The voter dataset is fully synthetic and disclosed throughout the UI.
